title: Probabilistic Path Selection Method in Planetary Exploration: Improving Terrain Adaptability through Tethered Cooperative Rover Systems
authors: Clive Jancen Kawaoto, Tenta Suzuki, Mao Tobisawa, Yuki Itoh, Kaito Kumagae, Johei Matsuoka, and Kiyohiko Hattori.
venue: Proceedings of the 9th International Symposium on Swarm Behavior and Bio-Inspired Robotics 2025 (SWARM2025)
